name: bfrpaulondev (Bruno Paulon) · GitHub
snippet: Welcome to my GitHub repository! I am a seasoned FullStack MERN developer with a passion for crafting efficient and user-centric web applications. With expertise in the MERN stack - MongoDB, Express.js, ReactJS, and Node.js - I bring a wealth of experience to every project I undertake.

name: Bruno Paulon's Portfolio - GitHub
snippet: Bruno Paulon's Portfolio Welcome to my portfolio! Here you'll find a showcase of my skills, projects, and experience as a full-stack developer specializing in the MERN stack. I'm passionate about creating innovative solutions that positively impact the world. My goal is to continuously learn and grow while contributing to meaningful projects.
